trigger_cases.prompt: Parse this original Xbox XBE's sections and kernel imports before lifting x86.
An OG Xbox native recomp has an ICALL failure through a RenderWare vtable.
Map an XBE guest virtual address safely through the host runtime.
Recover a kernel ordinal signature and failure behavior from callers.
The lifted Xbox x86 code mishandles x87 flags or stack ABI.
Classify an NV2A push-buffer/MMIO crash versus a translation error.
A generated dispatch override works but object initialization still corrupts the target.
Validate the native Xbox recomp's D3D8, audio, input, and save runtime layers.
Run a PC static recompiler on a generic Win32 PE.
Help me download an Xbox ISO and XDK.
Analyze a Windows DLL import table only.

output_cases.prompt: The ICALL target is in a remembered kernel range, so dispatch it as a thunk.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Verifies XBE/import mapping, caller and target bytes/provenance, object state and relocation/load identity before classifying or dispatching.

output_cases.prompt: Patch the generated C function so this title boots.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Maps the failure to loader/discovery/configuration/translator/runtime ownership, fixes the durable source, regenerates, and replays the same scenario.

output_cases.prompt: The build links and ICALL trace is clean, so mark the Xbox port complete.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Limits the result to build/observed calls and separately validates x86 semantics, kernel failures, D3D8/NV2A, APU/audio, input/network/saves/timing, and cleanup.
